summary: Define the serial closeout order for every completed target skill.
rules: When one worker completes, the controller must immediately enter serial closeout before filling the next slot.
The closeout order is fixed: verify -> commit-and-push -> mirror sync -> session closeout.
Remote writes must remain serial and must use the traceable record remote permitted by Meta-github-operation.
Mirror sync must run after Git traceability and must keep repo truth source plus ~/.codex/skills installation mirror consistent.
